one_cut_intro_v3.value:
You can win a portion of your potential returns even if one selection loses. The "One Cut Win" amount can be equal to or greater than your stake. With the new slider feature, adjust your potential 'To Win' and 'One Cut Win' amounts to customize your bet.

 

Note that void selections may result in recalculation of your return, and can become a lower "One Cut Win" amount than your stake.

2up_intro.value:
"2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 3-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same)."

2up_will_reward_you_earlier.value: 2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 3-1.

early_payout_1up_and_2up_tip_desc.value: Get paid out early if your team takes a one-goal or two-goal lead using the 1UP option, e.g. 1-0, 2-1 or 2UP option, e.g. 2-0, 3-1.

early_payout_1up_tip_desc.value: 1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1

1up_intro.value:
"1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same)."

1up_and_2up_intro.value:
1UP or 2UP will reward you earlier when your team takes the lead. For 1UP, any one-goal lead wins, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. With 2UP, any two-goal lead pays out early, e.g. 2-0, 3-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw.

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).  

Note - it is possible for both teams to win in these markets, for example a match turns around from 2-0 to 2-4 in 2UP.

early_goal_intro.value:
If a number of goals is scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is immediately settled as winning:

• Over 1.5 - 1 goal by 10 min

• Over 2.5 - 2 goal by 30 min

• Over 3.5 - 3 goal by 50 min


 

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the EarlyGoals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

early_goal_intro_title.value: EarlyGoals - if a number of goals is scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is immediately settled as winning:

early_goal_intro_content.value: Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the EarlyGoals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

early_goal_tip_desc.value: EarlyGoals pays you immediately, as follows: Over 1.5 - for 1 goal scored by 10 min.

early_goal_dialog_desc.value:
If a number of goals is scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is immediately settled as winning: 

• Over 1.5 - 1 goal by 10 min

 • Over 2.5 - 2 goal by 30 min 

• Over 3.5 - 3 goal by 50 min 

 

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the EarlyGoals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

players_can_receive_the_cashback.value: Players can receive the cashback in the following conditions:

1up_popup_info.value: 1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw! <br /><br /> If a match is abandoned and a team has gone one or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners. <br /><br /> SportyBet reserves the right to void selections for any integrity issues and abuse behaviours we identified.

1up_and_2up_popup_info.value:
1UP or 2UP will reward you earlier when your team takes the lead. For 1UP, any one-goal lead wins, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. With 2UP, any two-goal lead pays out early, e.g. 2-0, 3-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw.

The specific market or insurance type must be chosen by the customer to receive the rewards. Note -it is possible for both teams to win in these markets, for example a match turns around from 2-0 to 2-4 in 2UP.

SportyBet reserves the right to void selections for any integrity issues and abuse behaviours we identified.
